head: 13a69a7
objective: Refresh upstream candidate triage and the live LM Studio promotion gate before considering any new latency or stability intake.

upstream_main.head: 8ae2610
upstream_main.subject: Handle Gemma4 bidirectional visual prefill (#340)
upstream_main.decision: No mainline upstream change beyond the already-audited Gemma4 #340 commit.

candidate_branches.head: 9aa3db2
recent_commits: 9aa3db2 Rename Gemma4 grammar edge case test
05d1d64 Relax Gemma4 tool grammar edge cases
3035148 Move llguidance imports to module scope
candidate_branches.reason: The branch is a Gemma4 tool-runtime and grammar/reasoning guard feature. It is not a bounded retained-workload prompt-processing or generation-latency patch, depends on a new tool_runtime surface absent from the current branch, and lacks a retained benchmark target for Redmine #1190.

candidate_branches.head: 366ebd4
recent_commits: 366ebd4 Preserve backpressure in distributed stream bridge
4b6b826 Stop distributed stream when caller exits
d6656f1 Run sequential distributed MLX on model thread
bbf51db Align distributed load stream and add stream logs
candidate_branches.reason: The branch remains a broad distributed architecture rewrite with large deletes and new distributed model-kit surfaces. The stability-looking commits are not cleanly separable from the distributed runtime stack and are outside the Mac-local retained direct benchmark lane.

candidate_branches.head: c86c23a
recent_commits: c86c23a Run Qwen VLM prompts on model thread
3e41fdf Run MLX VLM generation on model thread
b7019fc Handle early distributed cancel requests
958ffb8 Run Gemma 4 MLX generation on model thread
e5a6faf Run distributed MLX scheduler on model thread
candidate_branches.reason: Despite model-thread stability themes, the branch is built on the same distributed/vision_add_ons rewrite and would remove or replace major local prompt-cache surfaces. It is not a small reversible candidate.

decision.next_action: Keep the current runtime unchanged. Continue with only a new isolated local hypothesis or retry official LM Studio registration; do not run live validation until preflight reports ready_for_live_validation=true.
